chunks.title: Solomon's Apostasy and Judgment
chunks.reason: Describes Solomon's foreign wives turning his heart to idols and Yahweh's initial decree to tear the kingdom from him.

chunks.title: Adversaries Raised Against Solomon
chunks.reason: Narrates the rise of Hadad the Edomite and Rezon of Aram as adversaries to Israel during Solomon's reign.

chunks.title: Jeroboam Called and Fled
chunks.reason: Introduces Jeroboam's rise, the prophet Ahijah's oracle dividing the kingdom, and Jeroboam's flight to Egypt.

chunks.title: Solomon's Death and Succession
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a summary of Solomon's reign, his death, and Rehoboam becoming king.
